title: In Iraq, huge crowds mourning Iranian leader reveal limits of U.S. role
summary_full: Some officials said the outpouring of grief was intended to show the continuing close ties between Iraq and Iran despite U.S. efforts to hold sway in Baghdad.
summary_public: Some officials said the outpouring of grief was intended to show the continuing close ties between Iraq and Iran despite U.S. efforts to hold sway in Baghdad.

IQ.label: negative
IQ.evidence: close ties between Iraq and Iran
